allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const a=JSON.parse\(d\);const may=a.find\(m=>m.month==='May 2026'\);console.log\('--- May 2026 summary ---'\);console.log\(may.summary\);console.log\('---'\);console.log\('Occurrences of \\"90\\":', \(may.summary.match\(/90/g\)||[]\).length\);console.log\('Occurrences of \\"110\\":', \(may.summary.match\(/110/g\)||[]\).length\)}\)")

PowerShell($email = git config --get user.email; $name = git config --get user.name; Write-Output "email=$email"; Write-Output "name=$name"; try { $ghv = gh --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "gh=$ghv" } catch { Write-Output "gh=not installed" }; try { $gha = gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 4; Write-Output "gh-auth:"; $gha } catch { Write-Output "gh-auth=na" })
